message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "clause_text": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement. In the event of such cancellation, Developer shall deliver to Company all work in progress, program specifications, etc., then in Developer’s possession. Cancellation pursuant to such failure to deliver shall not require any further payments to Developer as normally required pursuant to Clause 19.",
      "clause_name": "Termination Clause",
      "clause_type": "termination",
      "summary": "This clause allows the Company to cancel the Phase Agreement if the Developer fails to deliver the completed programs within a specified timeframe.",
      "risk_level": "high",
      "impact": "The Company can terminate the agreement without further payments, which could lead to financial loss for the Developer.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure timely delivery of programs to avoid cancellation.",
        "Consider including penalties for delays to incentivize timely performance."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "1d3092a3-4144-4005-a6d7-edb54adbe06f",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement."
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Failure by Developer to deliver the completed programming by the end of the ………… [insert number] days after the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement delivery after the date specified in the Phase Agreement, but prior to the expiration of a grace period of …….. [insert number] days, Company shall pay to Developer [%] of the price for that Phase. Failure by Developer to deliver the completed programming by the end of the ………[insert number] days after the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement will entitle Company to a ……. [insert number] % reduction in the cost of the entire Phase for each ……. [insert number] day period in which Developer is late.",
      "clause_name": "Delivery and Penalty Clause",
      "clause_type": "liability",
      "summary": "This clause outlines the penalties for the Developer if they fail to deliver the programming on time, including potential cost reductions for the Company.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "The Developer faces financial penalties for late delivery, which could affect profitability.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Establish clear timelines and monitor progress closely.",
        "Consider negotiating grace periods to allow for unforeseen delays."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.8",
      "source_clause_id": "482cd66c-ca7a-4b17-8535-93ba0845d9a9",
      "source_excerpt": "Failure by Developer to deliver the completed programming by the end of the ………… [insert number] days after the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement..."
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Upon passing the acceptance test, Company shall pay to Developer an additional ……. [insert number] % of the price of the phase, Developer was paid [%] for the delivery of the programs, Company shall pay to Developer ……. [insert number] % for the passing of the Acceptance Test. Company shall retain the final …… [insert number] % until the successful completion of ……[insert number] days of actual live use of said phase.",
      "clause_name": "Payment Upon Acceptance",
      "clause_type": "payment",
      "summary": "This clause specifies the payment structure contingent upon the successful passing of the acceptance test.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "The Developer's final payment is contingent on acceptance testing, which may delay cash flow.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure thorough testing procedures are in place to facilitate acceptance.",
        "Negotiate terms for partial payments to improve cash flow."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.11",
      "source_clause_id": "f5e0cb07-9c1b-481d-9b70-9bed8869e675",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon passing the acceptance test, Company shall pay to Developer an additional ……. [insert number] % of the price of the phase..."
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test. Company shall then confirm such notice by sending written confirmation of the failure plus proper documentation to Developer by certified mail, return receipt requested.",
      "clause_name": "Acceptance Test Failure Procedure",
      "clause_type": "dispute resolution",
      "summary": "This clause outlines the procedure to follow if the programs fail the acceptance tests, including notification requirements.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Failure to follow the procedure may lead to disputes over performance and acceptance.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Establish clear communication channels for reporting failures.",
        "Document all communications regarding acceptance testing."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.12",
      "source_clause_id": "65a8de99-bd28-4e5d-97f4-ca189e42ae59",
      "source_excerpt": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test..."
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Upon the signing of the Phase Agreement by both Company and Developer, Company shall pay to Developer ……… [insert number] % of the fixed cost indicated in the Phase Agreement. Developer will then proceed to write the programming for that phase.",
      "clause_name": "Initial Payment Clause",
      "clause_type": "payment",
      "summary": "This clause specifies the initial payment to the Developer upon signing the Phase Agreement.",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "impact": "Initial payment ensures Developer has funds to begin work, but may create cash flow issues for the Company.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Consider negotiating a smaller initial payment to manage cash flow.",
        "Ensure that the payment terms align with project milestones."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.6",
      "source_clause_id": "cd83ac05-51eb-4ffb-b923-50263f37c351",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon the signing of the Phase Agreement by both Company and Developer, Company shall pay to Developer ……… [insert number] % of the fixed cost indicated in the Phase Agreement."
    }
  ]
}
